title: Transaction Link
description: Links two related transactions, such as transfer legs recorded in separate accounts.

sourceTransactionId.title: Source Transaction ID
sourceTransactionId.description: UUID of the source transaction in the link.

destinationTransactionId.title: Destination Transaction ID
destinationTransactionId.description: UUID of the destination transaction in the link.

isSameSign.title: Is Same Sign
isSameSign.description: Whether the linked transactions are expected to have matching signs. When false, the linked transactions are expected to have opposite signs.
